testcase.name: putMeterDisconnect

failure.message: expected:<{"Connection":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Status can only change to Active or Inactive.","Level":3}]}}> but was:<{"Connection":{"Success":true,"Data":{"LocationId":"WATER003","BaseConnection":{"ConnectionSequence":1,"NewConnectionSequence":0},"AlternateConnection":[{"AlternateConnectionSequence":2,"NewAlternateConnectionSequence":0}],"SubtractConnection":"[]","Confirm":{"DisconnectToActiveValidation":false,"EquipmentReinstallValidation":false,"DisconnectMeterReadValidation":false}},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Updated","Level":1}]}}>

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected:<{"Connection":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Status can only change to Active or Inactive.","Level":3}]}}> but was:<{"Connection":{"Success":true,"Data":{"LocationId":"WATER003","BaseConnection":{"ConnectionSequence":1,"NewConnectionSequence":0},"AlternateConnection":[{"AlternateConnectionSequence":2,"NewAlternateConnectionSequence":0}],"SubtractConnection":"[]","Confirm":{"DisconnectToActiveValidation":false,"EquipmentReinstallValidation":false,"DisconnectMeterReadValidation":false}},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Updated","Level":1}]}}>
